fields.name: loan_applications
fields.description: Collection of loan applications submitted from the Credit department to Risk and Compliance for review and assessment

children.name: application_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan application

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the application was submitted

children.name: applicant
children.description: Personal and contact information of the loan applicant

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer in the banking system

children.name: full_name
children.description: Complete legal name of the applicant

children.name: date_of_birth
children.description: Date of birth of the applicant, used for identity verification and age assessment

children.name: email
children.description: Email address of the applicant for communication purposes

children.name: phone
children.description: Telephone number of the applicant

children.name: loan_details
children.description: Specifications and terms of the requested loan

children.name: loan_type
children.description: Classification of the loan product

children.name: requested_amount
children.description: Principal amount of the loan requested by the applicant

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the loan amount

children.name: term_months
children.description: Duration of the loan repayment period in months

children.name: interest_rate_type
children.description: Classification of the interest rate structure for the loan

children.name: purpose
children.description: Stated business purpose or use of the loan funds

children.name: employment
children.description: Employment and income information of the applicant

children.name: employment_status
children.description: Current employment status of the applicant

children.name: employer_name
children.description: Legal name of the applicant's current employer

children.name: job_title
children.description: Job title or position held by the applicant

children.name: annual_income
children.description: Gross annual income of the applicant from employment

children.name: employment_start_date
children.description: Date when the applicant commenced employment with the current employer

children.name: financial_profile
children.description: Summary of the applicant's financial position and credit history

children.name: total_assets
children.description: Total value of the applicant's assets

children.name: total_liabilities
children.description: Total value of the applicant's outstanding liabilities and debts

children.name: credit_score
children.description: Credit rating score of the applicant from credit reference agencies

children.name: existing_loans
children.description: Number of active loan facilities currently held by the applicant

children.name: default_history
children.description: Indicator of whether the applicant has any history of loan or credit defaults

children.name: credit_inquiries_last_6m
children.description: Number of credit inquiries made against the applicant's record in the last 6 months

children.name: collateral
children.description: Details of collateral or security offered against the loan

children.name: property_value
children.description: Estimated market value of the property offered as collateral

children.name: property_location
children.description: Geographic location of the collateral property

children.name: loan_to_value
children.description: Loan-to-value ratio expressed as a percentage; the proportion of the loan amount relative to the collateral value. Zero or null indicates no collateral is being used

children.name: application_status
children.description: Current processing status of the loan application

children.name: submitted_by
children.description: Identifier of the credit officer or system user who submitted the application

children.name: risk_category
children.description: Initial risk classification assigned to the application by the Credit department

children.name: required_compliance_checks
children.description: List of compliance and regulatory checks that must be performed on this application

children.name: check_type
children.description: Type of compliance check required

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Contextual information about the message batch and its routing between departments

children.name: source_department
children.description: The originating department that created and sent the message

children.name: destination_department
children.description: The receiving department responsible for processing the message

children.name: batch_date
children.description: Date on which the batch of applications was created

children.name: batch_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this batch of loan applications

children.name: total_applications
children.description: Count of loan applications included in this batch

children.name: data_classification
children.description: Security classification level indicating the sensitivity and handling requirements of the data
